violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Containers in the walk in cooler not date marked.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates on the salad bar and in the kitchen not inverted.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates in the kitchen are not covered or inverted.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Boxes of single serve items on the floor in the back room.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
